name: @codeflow/runtime
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — Agent Registry + Session Manager + Task Scheduler + Review Engine + Skill Runtime. v0.1.0-rc.1 internal preview (Sprint S6 acceptance): 14 subsystems, 94/94 tests, 30x 0 flakes. Backed by codeflow-shell single-EXE entry point. Not published to npm — for ADMIN test only. v0.2 sprint 0 will align to fcop@>=1.0,<2.0 (see FCoP issue #2).
